cooperates.cooperate_desc: The hero excels at dealing with thin targets that either don't have built-in jumping abilities or have a long cooldown. Use skills 1 and 2 for a guaranteed kill.

counters.counter_desc: The only hero that gives our hero problems is Natalia, because with her 2nd skill, she disables our 2nd skill damage (the hero's 2nd skill is an auto-attack) so be careful with her (the same goes for Karina, but you can still win against one of the worst junglers in the game, right? :) )
Tanks with control are also a problem, but this is a problem for any killer, so there are no special comments

dominants.dominant_desc: At the start and in the middle of the game, you are very strong. Your 2 skill is capable of killing 90% of subtle targets (magicians, shooters or other assassins). With the help of a passive skill, you can check bushes (if the screen brightens, it means someone is nearby (the exceptions are creeps on the line and enemy towers)).
If you've accumulated enough Snowballs, you'll be even more deadly in the late game.

emblems.emblem_desc: Emblems provide our hero with everything they need at all stages of the game: damage, jungle clearing, and healing after a kill.
Also, a good emblem build might appeal to someone more than the previous one

equips.equip_desc: The build allows you to play against a thin hero pick and literally keep them under the tower
This build allows you to damage even fatter peaks.

hero.hero_overview: The hero is great for solo kills, has good farming in the forest, and has a lot of control and burst damage that can be saved by either a prayer or a lot of physical defense.
hero.hero_strength: High damage, fast jungle farming, early team support, good game start and mid-game, and clear damage mechanics
hero.hero_weakness: The disadvantages include the inability to return to the game when you're behind, and the fear of tanks with control

data.recommend: A detailed guide about the Helcurt hero, build emblems, and more!

spell.spell_desc: Retribution for faster clearing of the forest, combine 2 skills and retribution for a guaranteed object (turtle or lord) to steal the object, and you can also use the ultimate to disintegrate the enemy jungler and their allies

hero.hero_overview: With meta marksman dominating once again, Helcurt becomes a viable choice to make matches easier
hero.hero_strength:
In the early game, during laning and the initial minutes, purchase the roam boots: Dire Hit. Level up Helcurt's skill 2 and immediately position yourself in the central bush of the gold lane. *Note: Do not position too close to the enemy turret, and wait for the enemy gold laner to enter the bush.

When the enemy enters the bush, use skill 2 to immediately deal massive damage to the enemy gold laner (marksman or squishy heroes). Then reposition and wait for the Stinger stacks to recharge, repeating the process multiple times with various variations
hero.hero_weakness:
Helcurt's biggest weakness is enemies who can continuously regenerate large amounts of health or heroes who can provide large-scale shields continuously. In this case, Mathilda is very troublesome for Helcurt.

Besides providing shields to allied heroes continuously on a large scale, Mathilda can also charge at Helcurt or reveal the map with her first skill. Besides Mathilda, Zhuxin is also a ban option when using Helcurt because his skill 2, Lantern, can reveal bushes from afar, which can disrupt Helcurt's surprise attacks continuously

data.recommend: Should Use if using Helcurt as Roamer Burst

spell.spell_desc:
The main spell for playing burst-type Helcurt roam is Execute. This is because of its short duration and the cooldown reduction when an enemy is eliminated directly by this spell, which helps Helcurt dominate surprise attacks against enemies in a single combo.

Another option is to use Petrify. In this case, Helcurt's main goal is not to dominate but to secure final executions for the team. The additional crowd control it provides can help teammates support each other effectively

data.title: Helcurt divel mode

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Mages yang memberikan burst damage tinggi cocok dipasangkan dengan Helcurt, karena mereka bisa melemahkan musuh sebelum Helcurt menyelesaikannya. Kontrol dan stun dari Luo Yi membantu mempersiapkan kill yang mudah bagi Helcurt.

counters.counter_desc: Helcurt bisa masuk dengan cepat dan membungkam hero squishy ini, mencegah mereka untuk memberikan damage sementara dia menghabisi mereka dalam beberapa detik.

dominants.dominant_desc: Trik Helcurt: Gunakan Dark Night Falls untuk mengurangi visi musuh dan menyerang dengan kejutan. Setelah itu, gunakan Shadow Transition untuk mendekati atau kabur, lalu serang dengan Deadly Stinger untuk damage besar, sambil memanfaatkan Killing Spree untuk regenerasi dan kecepatan gerakan setelah kill.

emblems.emblem_desc: Set Emblem Damage meningkatkan kekuatan Helcurt dengan menambah Physical Attack dan Penetrasi, sehingga memungkinkan dia memberikan damage lebih besar. Set ini cocok untuk menghabisi musuh dengan cepat, terutama hero squishy seperti Marksman dan Mage.

equips.equip_desc: Jika kamu memilih item one-hit untuk Helcurt, itu berarti kamu fokus pada meningkatkan damage besar dalam satu serangan. Item-item ini akan membuat Helcurt lebih kuat dalam mengalahkan musuh dengan cepat, terutama hero yang mudah mati seperti Marksman atau Mage.

hero.hero_overview: Helcurt adalah Assassin yang dikenal dengan kemampuan silence-nya yang unik. Dengan ultimate Dark Night Falls, Helcurt memberikan visibilitas rendah pada lawan, sehingga memudahkan untuk menyerang dengan kejutan.
hero.hero_strength: Helcurt memiliki burst damage tinggi, kemampuan silence untuk mengunci musuh, mobilitas cepat, dan ultimate yang mengontrol map, membuatnya sangat efektif untuk menyerang hero squishy dan mendominasi permainan.
hero.hero_weakness: Helcurt rentan terhadap crowd control (CC), membutuhkan timing yang tepat untuk memaksimalkan damage, dan kurang efektif melawan hero tanky atau tim dengan koordinasi yang baik.

data.recommend: Panduan ini akan membantu Anda memaksimalkan Helcurt untuk menguasai pertempuran dengan damage burst tinggi dan mobilitas cepat. Dominasi permainan dan hancurkan musuh dengan cepat!

spell.spell_desc: Execute memberikan true damage kepada hero musuh yang berada dalam jarak dekat. Damage ini berskala dengan HP musuh yang hilang, menjadikannya ideal untuk menghabisi lawan dengan HP rendah. Jika Execute berhasil mendapatkan kill, cooldown-nya akan berkurang.

dominants.dominant_desc: since helcurt is one of the fastest walking heroes you can always do an invasion with him depending on which buff the enemy starts you can know this by looking at where the gold lane is since jungles usually start farming opposite to where the gold lane is to gank it later (depends if the core is blue reliant) if the core starts at red you can take the small creep on the blue buff this small action delays their ability to get go level 4 making it hard to gank, if blue then take the golem

emblems.emblem_desc: the pen from assasin emblem plus the 7% damage increase of master assasin with rhe addition of 16 attack of thril gives the most amount of damage early game

equips.equip_desc: Sky peircer to stack its passive since youre gonna rack some kills early on and some more pen to have a chance against tank/sustain enemies

hero.hero_overview: Helcurt roaming have a different playstyle than his jungle counterpart
hero.hero_strength: he is insanely strong at level two and can burst down squishy so when you reach level 2 try and gank the middle lane first or their roamer if its a support he is also strong againt squishy jungles than need level or items to function such as hayabusa ling gusion
hero.hero_weakness: he is weak against heros than can sustain his 1 2 combo since he is vulnerable without his skills surviving his combo means you are exposed to the map with now way to escape and the enemy team can easily gang up on you

spell.spell_desc: at some cases at early game some squishy heroes can survive his 1 2 combo so its recommended to have a secondary type of stun to secure the kill since they are usually left with just 2 - 3 worth of hp

data.title: Helcurt Counter relations |Hero Guide
data.video_link: https://akmweb.youngjoygame.com/web/ugc/en/video/51哈卡特Helcurt_克制被克制 Counter relations_EN.mp4

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Wala na finish na tapos ang laban pag itong dalawang nagsama haha

counters.counter_desc:
Natalia is an excellent option. She can sneak up on him, remove his Prowler State passive, and swiftly execute him with her lethal combo.

While in conceal state, move from bush to bush in locating Helcurt. Once you spot him farming in the jungle or lane, use Hero Lock Mode to ensure you precisely target him with your assault.

dominants.dominant_desc: Always watch the map. This applies to any assassin jungler/roamer but Helcurt is pretty slow without ult and s1 could only go so far so the moment you get ambushed you may escape luckily or die to recall spammers XD. But if something squishy like a Kadita tried to ambush you but failed, just go in for the kill if you know you can finish her quickly and you did not see other enemies with her.

If there are 2 or more squishy enemies grouped together closely you can just ult, land s1 to silence all of them and unleash your s2. Keep in mind that Helcurt's s2 is TECHNICALLY AoE damage given the way the stingers fire at max stacks. Normally you'll easily burst the squishies down enough the finish them using basic attacks but congrats if you manage to one-tap them.

emblems.emblem_desc: Use the Custom Assassin Emblem as the only choice for Helcurt. It will provide both Movement Speed as well as Physical Penetration ...

equips.equip_desc: diko alam eh haha experiment ko lang yan but its work kaya maka onehit naman Basi sa experience ko sa paglalaro
diko alam eh haha experiment ko lang yan but its work kaya maka onehit naman Basi sa experience ko sa paglalaro

hero.hero_overview: Belonging to a mysterious race that dedicates itself to the Abyss to gain huge power, Helcurt often appears in the shadows to ambush his opponents, using the poisonous staggers on his body to deal his opponents a fatal blow.
hero.hero_strength: The fact he has access to an instantaneous teleport like gusion with such a short cooldown is too good and too much with his already fast move speed.
hero.hero_weakness: Helcurt is weak to heores with either Suppression or CC immunities as his passive, Race Advantage, is considered useless. He is also weak against heroes who use Silence & low-level CCs, particularly Silvanna. Natalia & Karina can also just eat up Helcurt's stingers with their basic attack immunities.

spell.spell_desc: Petrify is so good because you can use it to hold the enemy still as you aim (not auto-attack) all your stingers and land the insane damage.

data.title: HELCURT my best roamer that's why I reached mythical immortal playing solo ,best build and emblem set up,tips and tricks
